Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF LANE COUNTY FLORENCE SELF-SUFFICIENCY AND VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION LOW INCOME HOME ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Energy assistance program for households with seniors that heat with electricity, natural gas, oil, propane, wood pellets or wood through a limited federal government funding program. The Low Income Home Energy Program (LIHEAP) makes a one-time payment directly to the utility account. 3180 Highway 101 Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Household with a member over 60 years old and 60% of median income level Hours: Call for hours (541) 682-7835 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SENIOR CENTERS LANE COUNTY WILLAMALANE ADULT ACTIVITY CENTER LIHEAP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides winter warming and summer cooling utility assistance, including electric, natural gas, and heating fuel. All assistance is through a waitlist. Assistance is not guaranteed. 215 W C Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: -Must be age 60 years or older -Most programs: 60% of Area Median Income Hours: -Waitlist enrollment is ongoing and open monthly starting Monday, January 5, 2026 until capacity is reached -Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 736-4406 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF LANE COUNTY LOW INCOME HOME ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM SENIOR CENTERS LANE COUNTY LIHEAP
